title: Cellforge
description: A multi-sheet spreadsheet with a from-scratch formula engine — hand-written lexer, Pratt parser, evaluator, and one live dependency graph with topological recalc + cycle detection. NEW v3 — DYNAMIC ARRAYS that spill out of a cell (#SPILL!, array broadcasting), a real LAMBDA/LET layer with MAP/REDUCE/SCAN, and GOAL SEEK (a secant+bisection what-if solver). Plus cross-sheet refs, named ranges, undo/redo, Excel-compatible dates, ~190 functions, draggable SVG charts, and find & replace. 159 in-app engine self-tests.
